bot.welcome_new:
Welcome to Pressure Tracker! 🩺

I'm your personal health assistant, here to help you:

✅ Track your blood pressure daily
📊 Visualize pressure measurements
💊 Manage your medication schedule
🔔 Never miss important reminders
📈 Monitor your progress over time
For more details type command /help

Your heart health matters! Let's start this journey together.

Tap "Open App" below to begin! 👇
bot.welcome_back:
Welcome back, {username}! 👋

Ready to check in on your health today?
bot.help:
🩺 Pressure Tracker - Your Health Companion

What I can do:

📝 Track Blood Pressure
Log your measurements anytime with detailed notes. Quick presets make it super fast!

📊 Visual Analytics
See your health trends with beautiful charts. Weekly, monthly, and yearly views available.

📅 Calendar View
Review your measurement history day by day with color-coded status indicators.

💊 Medication Manager
Set up your pill schedule with multiple daily reminders. Never forget a dose!

🔔 Smart Reminders
Get timely notifications for both pressure checks and medications.

🎯 Target Goals
Set your ideal blood pressure range and track your progress.

📤 Export Data
Download your health records anytime for sharing with your doctor.

Commands:
/start - Open the app
/help - Show this help message

Need Support?
If you have questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out @rialnns!

💚 Stay healthy!
pressure_reminders:
⏰ Time for your blood pressure check!

Take a moment to measure and log your results. Consistency helps you stay in control! 🩺

🩸 Daily Health Check Reminder

How's your heart doing today? Open the app to record your pressure. It only takes 30 seconds! ⚡

📊 Let's keep your streak going!

Your scheduled pressure check is due. Regular tracking = better insights! 💪

💙 Your health matters!

Time to measure your blood pressure. Don't forget to add any notes about how you're feeling. ✍️

⌚ Check-up time!

Consistent measurements help you understand your health patterns. Ready? Let's do this! 🎯

🔔 Gentle reminder: Blood Pressure Check

Take a deep breath, relax, and measure. Your future self will thank you! 🙏

💊 Hey there! Time for *{item_name}*

Consistency is key to feeling your best. Let's check this off together! ✨

⏰ Don't miss your dose!

*{item_name}* is due now. Take it with water and mark it complete. 💧

🩺 Health Reminder: *{item_name}*

Your scheduled medication is ready. Taking care of yourself starts with small steps! 🌟

success.pressure_logged:
✅ Blood pressure logged successfully!

{sys}/{dia} mmHg recorded at {time}

tips:
💡 *Health Tip*

Measure your blood pressure at the same time each day for the most accurate trends! ⏰

💡 *Did you know?*

Resting for 5 minutes before measuring can give you more accurate readings! 🧘

💡 *Pro Tip*

Avoid caffeine and exercise 30 minutes before measuring your blood pressure! ☕🚫

💡 *Reminder*

Keep your arm at heart level when measuring for best results! ❤️
